title: [FIRRTL] Don't Create Trivially Empty Layer Blocks in LowerLayers

features.name: empty module from outer-only layerblock lowering
features.description: Code should include an empty module declaration produced when an outer layerblock contains only an inner nested layerblock, resulting in a module with no ports and no body statements

features.name: bind instantiation of zero-port empty module
features.description: Code should include a bind statement that instantiates a module with zero ports and no internal logic into a target module, where the bound module is entirely empty

features.name: hierarchical cross-module reference inside bind-instantiated module
features.description: Code should include a wire inside a bind-instantiated module that references a signal from the target module using a hierarchical path, such as accessing the parent module's input directly

features.name: nested layer bind files with include guard chaining
features.description: Code should include two separate bind include files where the inner layer file uses an ifndef guard and also includes the outer layer's bind file, creating a chained include-guard dependency between nested layer bind constructs
